expectations.text: Response reports current HP (and ideally mana/move points)
Response reports carried and/or worn items
expectations.evidence: summary.md lists both 'Carrying (Inventory)' (a small sword) and full 'Wearing (Equipment)' list

expectations.text: No lingering connection to the MUD server (port 4000) or stray background process after the task finishes
expectations.evidence: Verified independently after the run: `ss -tn | grep :4000` returned nothing, `pgrep mud_client.py` found no daemon process, and the agent's own report cites `status` showing Connected: False

notes: Used the skill's mud_client.py start/send/status/stop loop exactly as documented, single persistent session.
